summary: Comprehensive testing of Bashari Lab-Direct ERP System completed. All 39 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified working across all major pages: Dashboard, Jobs, Stones, Clients, Shipments, Settings. Key features tested: Auth (admin/customer/branch_admin), Job CRUD with discount field, Stone mounted/color stability toggles, Payment flow with adjustment payments, Certificate grouping, Mobile responsiveness.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /jobs/{id} - returns job with stones
Backend: POST /jobs - creates job with stones
Backend: PUT /stones/{id}/fees - color stability toggle works
Backend: PUT /stones/{id}/fees - actual fee update works
Backend: Adjustment payment token generation works
Backend: Customer cannot list all clients (returns empty)
Backend: Customer sees only own jobs
Frontend: Admin dashboard shows stats (22 jobs, 94 clients)
Frontend: Jobs page renders 22 jobs in table
Frontend: Job detail dialog - 2-column layout (stones left, sidebar right)
Frontend: Job detail shows discount field and Net Total
Frontend: Payment section shows Copy Link + Open buttons
Frontend: Stone detail dialog shows mounted status (Yes/No)
Frontend: Stone detail shows Color Stability with fee (+$50)
Frontend: Stone detail shows verbal findings dropdowns
Frontend: Clients page lists 94 clients with Add Client button
Frontend: Shipments page lists 9 shipments with Create Shipment button
Frontend: Settings page shows Verbal Dropdowns, Branches, Pricing, Admin Users tabs
Frontend: Customer dashboard shows restricted view (7 jobs, limited menu)
Frontend: Payment page renders with adjustment notice
Frontend: Payment page shows stones list and total
Frontend: Payment page has currency selector and Pay button
Frontend: Mobile viewport (390px) renders without horizontal scroll
critical_code_review_comments: All API endpoints working correctly with proper authentication
Mounted fee propagation to certificate group implemented correctly
Discount field saves and reflects in Net Total calculation
Payment adjustment flow working with proper notice display
Mobile responsive design working without layout breaks
seed_data_creation: Created test job and client during API tests (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full system test completed. All features working: Auth (3 roles), Jobs CRUD with discount, Stones with mounted/color stability toggles, Payments with adjustment flow, Clients, Shipments, Settings. Mobile responsive. Safe clients for email testing: ofir1@bashds.com (client_id: 699d74286ed929c698bfe682), ofir3@bashds.com (client_id: 69ae84cea4faa5cd3560dbc2). Job #18 has 3 stones in certificate group 1 for mounted propagation testing. Job #22 has adjustment payment set up.
